data.reasoningText: The user wants to run only tests with Category=Integration trait in their xUnit project. Let me look at the project files to understand the setup, then run the filtered tests.

arguments.description: Run xUnit tests filtered by Category=Integration

toolCalls.name: bash
toolCalls.args: {"command": "cd /tmp/sv-b493d98f76b249c396cac09043b6f0d0 && dotnet test --filter \"Category=Integration\" --no-restore 2>&1 | tail -20", "description": "Run xUnit tests filtered by Category=Integration", "initial_wait": 30}

data.content:
All **5 Integration tests passed** ✅

The command used:

```
dotnet test --filter "Category=Integration"
```

This uses the `--filter` flag with `Category=Integration` to match only tests decorated with `[Trait("Category", "Integration")]`.
